## Local Changes

- Converted the source into a project-local skill with trigger-focused frontmatter.
- Converted the paid Gemini TTS render path, the `run.py`/`generate_audio.py` scripts, the `GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY` gate, FFmpeg dependency, and `/blog audio setup` into Boundaries; the actual render routes to a TTS adapter.
- Migrated the portable script-writing methodology (summary / full / dialogue modes), voice-selection judgment, model recommendation, and embed/placement guidance into SKILL.md.
- Copied the full voice catalog to `references/voices.md` so the skill works after the top-level `references/` tree is deleted.
- Preserved the source as reference material rather than executable instructions.
